title: ferray-stats: histogram bins='auto'/'sturges'/'fd' etc. not supported
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's np.histogram supports bins='auto', 'fd', 'doane', 'scott', 'stone', 'rice', 'sturges', 'sqrt' for automatic bin width estimation. ferray-stats Bins enum only has Count(usize) and Edges(Vec<T>). Add at least 'auto' (max of 'sturges' and 'fd') and 'sturges' (ceil(log2(n))+1) for automatic binning.
